## [00:00 - 01:11]

In this video I want to share with you how if you just change one small behaviour with how you currently communicate it can completely transform how other people perceive you. So through medical school I've always wanted to be a physician so you know looking after your heart, lungs and you know I just went to the wards and... You're feeling a lot of the silence with the arms, arms and a soul. So filler words are something I want you to pay attention to now. I want some slower rates of speech and some pauses. No so's, r's or um's. And very conscious of replacing the um's and the r's and the so's with silence. I went into medical school thinking that I've always wanted to just help humanity save lives, do big changes. People know that it's not all about saving lives in that life and death, it's about changing quality of life. Big round of applause. That was amazing. Isn't that crazy? One simple thing, just removing the um's and the r's, the non words and the filler words and it completely transformed the clarity in the message and also how confident she came across.
